evals.prompt: Hay que migrar el módulo de auth de JWT a session tokens. Toca el middleware, los handlers de login/logout, los tests de integración y el CLAUDE.md.
evals.expected_output: The agent checks git status, decides on a branch or worktree and its base ref, divides the work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks, registers every subtask with TaskCreate, includes the CLAUDE.md update and the quality gate as their own subtasks, and hands off to task-execution.
expectations: The agent checks git status or mentions creating a branch or worktree before touching anything
The agent divides work into lettered groups (A, B, C...) with numbered subtasks (A1, A2...)
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate to register every subtask
The agent registers the CLAUDE.md documentation update as its own subtask
The agent registers the quality gate as its own subtask
The agent hands off to task-execution rather than starting to write code itself

evals.prompt: Refactoriza el servicio de pagos para separar la validación del procesamiento. Toca payment-service.ts, validators.ts, payment-handler.ts, types.ts y los tests.
evals.expected_output: The agent identifies this as a pure refactor, checks git state, divides into lettered groups sequenced so each leaves a committable state, registers them with TaskCreate, and hands off to task-execution without writing code.
expectations: The agent checks git status or mentions creating a branch or worktree
The agent divides work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate
The agent sequences the groups so each one leaves the tree in a committable state
The agent hands off to task-execution rather than writing code itself

evals.prompt: Implementa paginación cursor-based en los endpoints GET /users y GET /orders. Necesita los handlers, los DTOs de respuesta paginada, las queries en el repositorio, actualizar los tests y documentar los contratos en el CLAUDE.md.
evals.expected_output: The agent checks git state and the base ref, divides into lettered groups with concrete file-level subtasks, registers everything with TaskCreate including docs and the quality gate, and hands off to task-execution.
expectations: The agent checks git status or mentions creating a branch or worktree
The agent divides work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks
Every subtask names a concrete observable action rather than research or investigation
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate
The agent registers the CLAUDE.md contract documentation as its own subtask
The agent hands off to task-execution

evals.prompt: Hay que manejar los webhooks de Stripe: payment_intent.succeeded, payment_intent.payment_failed y customer.subscription.deleted. Cada uno actualiza estado en la BD y dispara notificaciones.
evals.expected_output: The agent checks git state, divides the three webhook handlers plus persistence and notification into lettered groups, registers them with TaskCreate, and hands off to task-execution.
expectations: The agent checks git status or mentions creating a branch or worktree
The agent divides work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate
The agent registers the quality gate as its own subtask
The agent hands off to task-execution

evals.prompt: Solo quiero el plan por ahora: agregar soporte multi-tenancy al módulo de usuarios. Cada query tiene que filtrar por tenant_id, los tests deben cubrir el aislamiento entre tenants y el CLAUDE.md necesita documentar el pattern.
evals.expected_output: The agent produces the lettered breakdown and registers it, then stops and presents the groups instead of handing off to task-execution, because the user explicitly asked for a plan only.
expectations: The agent divides work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate
The agent stops after presenting the breakdown instead of handing off to task-execution
The agent does not start writing code
